description_long: This is a classical-style marble bust depicting a bearded male figure with curly hair, draped in a toga-like garment. The sculpture is highly detailed, with intricate curls in the hair and a textured beard, giving it a lifelike appearance. The facial features are finely carved, showing a calm and contemplative expression. The bust is mounted on a round pedestal base, which supports the weight of the upper torso and head. The drapery of the garment is rendered with deep folds and realistic flow, adding to the sense of realism. The overall finish is smooth with subtle variations in surface texture, typical of marble statuary.
description: A detailed marble bust of a bearded man with curly hair, draped in a toga and mounted on a round pedestal. The sculpture features lifelike facial details and realistic garment folds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, detailed beard, curly hair, and draped garment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the depth of the hair curls, and the drapery over the shoulder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with curly hair and the broad, flat back of the bust and pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, beard, and the draped garment over the right shoulder.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
